info.title: Document Generation Service
info.description: Core services for template processing and LLM interaction.

post.description: Register a new user and organization.
Create a new document generation run and start the orchestrator in the background.

get.description: Retrieve document generation runs for the current user's organization.
Retrieve a document generation run by its ID.
Retrieve artefacts for a run.

post.description: Generate presigned PUT URLs. Does NOT create DB records yet.

Standard Create Endpoint.
Client calls this AFTER successfully uploading to the presigned URL.
Create Endpoint for multiple files.

get.description: Retrieve files.
Get file metadata by ID.

Generate a presigned download URL for a file.

Args:
    inline: If True, sets content-disposition to inline (for browser preview).
           If False (default), sets to attachment (for download).

post.description: Add an update entry to a job's timeline.

get.description: Get current user.

post.description: Create a new client.

get.description: Retrieve clients.

post.description: Create a new contact for a client.
Start a new timer for a project. Stops any existing active timer.
Stop the currently active timer and update project actual hours.

get.description: Get the currently active timer if exists.

schema.title: Response Get Current Timer Time Current Get

post.description: Create a new lead.

get.description: Retrieve leads, optionally filtered by status.
Get a specific lead by ID.

post.description: Add an update entry to a lead's timeline.

Convert a lead to a client. Creates a Client and optionally a Contact
from the lead's data. Updates lead status to CONVERTED.
Create a new quote with optional quote lines (potential projects).

get.description: Retrieve quotes, optionally filtered by status or client.
Get a specific quote by ID.

post.description: Add a line (potential project) to a quote.
Add an update entry to a quote's timeline.

Convert a quote to a job. If the quote is linked to a lead,
the lead is also converted to a client. Projects are created
from quote lines.
Create a new survey.

get.description: Retrieve surveys, optionally filtered by job.
Get a specific survey by ID.

post.description: Create a new task.

get.description: Retrieve tasks, optionally filtered by project or status.
Get a specific task by ID.

patch.description:
Reorder a task within a column or move to a different column.
Updates the task's status and order position.

get.description: Get all invitations for the organization. Admin only.

post.description: Invite a new user to the organization. Admin only.

get.description:
Verify an invitation token and return public info (org name, etc.).
This is called by the frontend before showing the accept form.

post.description: Accept an invitation and create the user account.
Resend an invitation email. Admin only.

get.description: Get current user's organization with all members.

patch.description: Update a user in the organization. Admin only.

delete.description: Remove a user from the organization. Admin only.

InvitationPublic.title: InvitationPublic
InvitationPublic.description: Public info shown to invited user (no sensitive data)

OrgUserRead.title: OrgUserRead
OrgUserRead.description: User info for org management (admins viewing org members)

TaskReorder.title: TaskReorder
TaskReorder.description: Request body for reordering a task
